Privacy Policy

We believe in data minimization. We collect only the data that is necessary to provide the service. We do not collect precise location, biometric data, or browsing history unless you explicitly opt in.

Sharing With Third Parties

We do not sell your personal information. We do not share your personal data with third party advertisers, marketing partners, or data brokers. Service providers are bound by strict contractual privacy and confidentiality obligations.

Retention

We retain personal information only as long as necessary to provide the service you requested. We delete inactive account data after 90 days. We also anonymize aggregate analytics after 30 days.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, deletion, portability, rectification, and to object to processing. You may submit a deletion request through our privacy dashboard. You can also download a copy of your data. You may withdraw your consent at any time.

Children

We comply with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA). We do not knowingly collect data from children under the age of 13. Parental consent is required for any user under 13.

California Residents

If you are a California resident, the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) gives you the right to opt-out of the sale of your personal information. We do not sell personal information. You may submit a "Do Not Sell My Personal Information" request through our privacy center. We also honor the Global Privacy Control (GPC) signal.

Cookies & Tracking

You can disable cookies through our cookie settings. We respect the Do-Not-Track (DNT) browser signal. We do not use third-party tracking pixels or session replay tools.

Security & Breach Notification

In the unlikely event of a security incident, we will notify affected individuals without undue delay and within 72 hours where required by law.
